raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Polish this' directly requests improvements in grammar, flow, register, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph levels for the provided research text.","RX.1":"Polishing the artifact involves refining the existing hedges and qualifiers to appropriately disclose uncertainties in model performance and improvements.","RX.2":"The task expects avoiding overstatements of modest improvements and potential benefits in the polished version of the scientific reporting.","RX.3":"Ensuring the polished text adheres to the scope of reporting performance on specific benchmarks without extraneous additions is a central expectation.","RX.4":"While not central, polishing bio-AI related text peripherally considers avoiding language that could enable downstream harms in variant prediction applications.","RX.5":"The delegation peripherally implies maintaining traceability to mentioned baselines like ESM-2 during polishing for accurate provenance."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Polish this' directly requests improvements in grammar, flow, register, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph levels for the provided research text.
rationale.RX.1: Polishing the artifact involves refining the existing hedges and qualifiers to appropriately disclose uncertainties in model performance and improvements.
rationale.RX.2: The task expects avoiding overstatements of modest improvements and potential benefits in the polished version of the scientific reporting.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring the polished text adheres to the scope of reporting performance on specific benchmarks without extraneous additions is a central expectation.
rationale.RX.4: While not central, polishing bio-AI related text peripherally considers avoiding language that could enable downstream harms in variant prediction applications.
rationale.RX.5: The delegation peripherally implies maintaining traceability to mentioned baselines like ESM-2 during polishing for accurate provenance.
